emails.subject: Following up on our proposal
emails.body: Hi, just checking in on the proposal we discussed last week. We have a board meeting Thursday and would love to have something to present. Our contract is worth around $200k annually.

emails.subject: Scheduled maintenance tonight 11pm-1am
emails.body: Reminder: planned maintenance window tonight. Some services will be intermittently unavailable. No action needed from your side.

emails.subject: RE: RE: RE: Budget approval - URGENT
emails.body: Hi, I sent this three times already. The finance team needs the Q2 budget signed off by EOD or we lose the vendor discount. This has been stuck in approvals for a week.

emails.subject: New employee onboarding - start date Feb 1
emails.body: Just a heads up that two new engineers are joining February 1st. Please ensure their laptops and access are ready by January 30th.

emails.subject: Your Amazon order has shipped
emails.body: Your order #112-4521890 has been shipped and will arrive by Thursday.

email_001.response_hint: Prioritizing proposal and sending to board by Wednesday.

email_003.response_hint: Approving Q2 budget immediately to secure vendor discount.
